briefdescription.para: < Hamming loops, data and length
< Mode types and definitions
< ReadModes and definitions
< EFUSE operation modes and definitions
< EFUSE Reference Clock frequency definitions
< eFuse read margin control: 00 normal, 01 margin 1, 10 margin 2, 11 - undefined
< Xilinx reserved Tests bits in the First half of the eFUSE block offsets and definitions
< Xilinx reserved Tests bits in the Second half of the eFUSE block offsets
< Xilinx reserved Tests bits in the First half of the eFUSE block address
< Xilinx reserved Tests bits in the First half of the eFUSE block address
< Xilinx reserved Tests bits in the First half of the eFUSE block address
< Xilinx reserved Tests bits in the Second half of the eFUSE block address
Rsa Key hash length in bits.
Rsa Key hash length calculation.
Strobe width calculation.
Modified to have max of 32 bit value.
PSS eFUSE Register addresses.

detaileddescription.para: eFuse base address

briefdescription.para: WR_LOCK Write lock offset.
WR_UNLOCK Write 0xDF0D to allow write offset.
WR_LOCKSTA Write protection status offset.
CFG Configuration register offset.
STATUS Status register offset.
CONTROL Control register offset.
PGM_STBW eFuse program strobe width register offset.
RD_STBW eFuse read strobe width register offset.
WR_LOCK Write 0x767B to disallow write.
WR_UNLOCK Write 0xDF0D to allow write.
WR_LOCKSTA Write protection status.
CFG Configuration register.
STATUS Status register.
CONTROL Control register.
PGM_STBW eFuse program strobe width register.
RD_STBW eFuse read strobe width register.

detaileddescription.para: PSS eFUSE register bit defines & description XSK_EFUSEPS_WR_LOCK_STATUS_REG (Write Protection Status Register)

briefdescription.para: Current state of write protection mode of eFuse subsystem:- 0 Region is writable 1 Region is not writable.

detaileddescription.para: Any attempted writes are ignored, but reads will complete as normal.XSK_EFUSEPS_CONFIG_REG (Configuration Register)

briefdescription.para: Redundancy mode, if set, else single mode.

detaileddescription.para: This bit only applies to APB access. BISR and eFuse reader always work in redundancy mode.

briefdescription.para: eFuse read/program setup/hold control between address and strobe assert 1 b0 1 ref clock cycle 1 b1 2 ref clock cycles
eFuse read/program setup/hold control between csb and strobe assert 1 b0 1 ref clock cycle 1 b1 2 ref clock cycles
eFuse program setup/hold control between ps and csb active
Reference clock scaler 2 b00 bypass clock divider 2 b01 div 2 2 b10 div 4 2 h11 div 8.

detaileddescription.para: XSK_EFUSEPS_STATUS_REG (Status Register)

briefdescription.para: Status Register containing BISR Controller status, trim value, and security debug info.

detaileddescription.para: Build in self test finished at boot time

briefdescription.para: Build in self test finished successfully.
eFuse box is blank, i.e., not yet been written to, if set
Security debug status, with authentication 0 security debug enabled 1 security debug disabled.
eFuse write protection, if either bit is set, writes to the eFuse box are disabled
Analog trim value.
XSK_EFUSEPS_CONTROL_REG (Control register for eFuse program, read and write control) eFuse ps control, enable programming if set.
eFuse write disable, if set.
eFuse read disable, if set
eFuse memory APB Customer key start address offset
eFuse memory APB Customer key first half start address offset
eFuse memory APB Customer key second half start address offset
eFUSE APB address for ROM 128k CRC enable offset
eFUSE APB address for RSA authentication enable offset
eFUSE DFT JTAG disable
eFUSE DFT mode disable
eFUSE APB address for RSA uart status enable on MIO48 offset
eFUSE APB address for non-secure INIT_B signaling offset
eFUSE bits from 0 to 0x1F and 0x180 to 0x1FF in the First half, and bits from 0x200 to 0x21F and 0x380 to 0x3FF in the Second half(if Single mode is enabled)

detaileddescription.para: If Redundant mode is enabled only First half addresses are valid. eFuse memory APB Customer key first half start address

briefdescription.para: eFuse memory APB Customer key first half end address
If Single mode is enabled both First and Second half addresses are valid.

detaileddescription.para: eFuse memory APB Customer key second half start address

briefdescription.para: eFuse memory APB Customer key second half end address
Mirror Address = addr + 2nd half start address + mirror offset.
eFuse memory APB start address
eFuse memory APB Customer key second half start address
eFuse memory APB Customer key second half start address
eFUSE APB address for ROM 128k CRC enable
eFUSE APB address for RSA authentication enable
eFuse DFT JTAG disable
eFuse DFT mode disable
eFUSE APB address for RSA uart status enable on MIO48
eFUSE APB address for non-secure INIT_B signaling
eFUSE bits from 0 to 0x1F and 0x180 to 0x1FF in the First half, and bits from 0x200 to 0x21F and 0x380 to 0x3FF in the Second half(if Single mode is enabled)

detaileddescription.para: If Redundant mode is enabled only First half addresses are valid.
eFuse memory APB Customer key first half start address

briefdescription.para: eFuse memory APB Customer key first half end address
If Single mode is enabled both First and Second half addresses are valid.

detaileddescription.para: eFuse memory APB Customer key second half start address

briefdescription.para: eFuse memory APB Customer key second half end address
Mirror Address = addr + 2nd half start address + mirror offset.
This macro is used to lock the efuse controller.
This macro is used to unlock the efuse controller.
This macro is used to check the status whether eFuse controller is locked or not.

simplesect.para:
- TRUE if the 32 bit Value read from the specified input address
FALSE if the 32 bit Value not read from the specified input address

briefdescription.para: This macro is used to determine operation mode of efuse controller.

listitem.para: TRUE if eFuse controller mode is redundancy
FALSE if eFuse controller mode is single

briefdescription.para: This macro is used to check whether eFuse is write protected or not.

listitem.para: TRUE if eFuse is write protected.
FALSE is eFuse is not write protected.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to generate the matrix map of the G and H for hamming code (31,26).

detaileddescription.para: G is [31,5] and defined as [A|I], I is identity matrix of [5,5].
None TDD Cases: Check the generated matrix Check the memory corruption of the generated matrix

briefdescription.para: This function is used to decode the incoming encoded byte.

detaileddescription.para:
Corrupt
is the input encoded data. It has 26 bit data with 5 bit parity data
Syndrome
is the output updated with the parity error information.
position of the error in the data byte TDD Cases: Check the parameters Check the decode with out any error Check the decode with 1 bit error Check the decode with 2 bit error Check the decode for boundary cases Check for memory corruption

briefdescription.para: This function is used to encode the incoming data byte.

detaileddescription.para: It uses hamming (31,26) algorithm. 26 bits are encoded to 31 bits

InData
is 26 bit input data with each bit represented in one byte
Ecc
is the 31 bit encoded data with each bit represented in one byte
None TDD Cases: Check the parameters Check the encoded data for different input data Check the input data for boundary cases Check for memory corruption

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set the controller mode, read mode along with the read and program strobe width values based on the reference clock.

parameterdescription.para:
is the mode of the controller
XSK_EFUSEPS_REDUNDANCY_MODE
XSK_EFUSEPS_SINGLE_MODE
is the CPU 1x reference clock frequency. Clock frequency can be between 20MHz to 100MHz specified in Hz

is the read mode of the controller
XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_MODE_NORMAL
XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_MODE_MARGIN_1
XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_MODE_MARGIN_2

listitem.para: an error when controller mode is not supported
an error when reference clock is not supported
an error when read mode is not supported

detaileddescription.para: Test Cases: Check single mode in CFG Reg Check redundancy mode in CFG Reg Check strobe width values for write mode Check strobe width values for various read mode Check Normal Read mode setting in CFG Reg Check Margin 1 Read mode setting in CFG Reg Check Margin 2 Read mode setting in CFG Reg Boundary Conditions

inbodydescription.para: Check the parameters Mode can be Single or Redundancy mode
Program the Strobe width values for read and write 12us is required for write and 150ns is required for read PGM_STBW = ceiling(12us/ref_clk period) RD_STBW = ceiling(150ns/ref_clk period)

briefdescription.para: This function is used to check whether eFuse bit is xilinx reserved bit or not.

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the eFuse bit.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if address corresponds to restricted eFuse bit.
XST_FAILURE is address corresponds to non-restricted eFuse bit.

detaileddescription.para: Test Cases: with different address values Boundary values for addr

briefdescription.para: This function is used to enable the read/write/program the eFUSE array.

detaileddescription.para:
ReadWriteEnable
0x1 - Enable programming 0x2 - Enable read 0x4 - Enable write
Test Cases

inbodydescription.para: Reset the values Disable programming Disable reading Disable writing

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read the eFuse bit value.

detaileddescription.para: Before using this function set the controller mode and read mode as required. Also, strobe width values are to be set properly based on the reference clock for successful reading

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the eFuse bit.
has the read eFuse value stored in it.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS for successfully reading the value.
an error when addr is restricted

detaileddescription.para: Test Cases Read in Single mode Read in redundancy mode Read for restricted address Boundary Checks for address

briefdescription.para: This function is used to program the eFuse bit value.

detaileddescription.para: Before using this function set the controller mode and read mode as required. Also, strobe width values are to be set properly based on the reference clock for successful programming

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the eFuse bit.

listitem.para: an error when addr is restricted

detaileddescription.para: Test Cases Write in Single mode Write in redundancy mode Write for restricted address Boundary Checks for address Strobe width are not proper (Check if it makes sense)

inbodydescription.para: Send success when bit is already programmed
Providing 15us delay Timer takes 100ns as slice. 15us = 150 * 100ns

detaileddescription.para: None. MODIFICATION HISTORY:
Ver Who Date Changes 1.00a rpoolla 04/26/13 First release 4.00 vns 09/10/15 Added DFT control bits addresses 7.2 am 07/13/21 Fixed doxygen warnings
